I found your dental check-up on your calendar:

- Title: Dentist Appointment  
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00

How would you like to reschedule it? A few quick options — please pick one or give details:
1. Tell me the exact new date and start time (and duration, if different) — e.g. “May 24 at 11:00 for 1 hour.”  
2. Give availability constraints (morning/afternoon, days of week, date range) and I’ll find the next open 1-hour slot and propose options.  
3. Move it by X days/weeks from the current date (e.g. “one week later”).

Also tell me:
- Do you want me to only update your calendar event, or should I notify the dental clinic? (I don’t have the clinic’s contact on the event, so I’ll need the clinic’s email/phone if you want me to contact them.)

Once you confirm which option and provide the new time or constraints, I’ll update the event (and notify participants if you instruct me to).
